questions.question: What are the three main properties of a transport-layer protocol, as described in the 24.3.6-24.3.9 section of the module?
Explain the function of the acknowledgement (ACK) and acknowledgement number (ACKN) fields in the TCP header, using an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Use a specific scenario to demonstrate the use of ACK and ACKN in TCP

questions.question: Describe the differences between a TCP segment and an IP packet, focusing on the information contained within the header and the function of the transport-layer protocol.
